# Hypertube — View (React + Vite + TypeScript SPA)

The Hypertube front end. It talks **only** to its same-origin proxy
(`../grobase/serve.mjs`), which forwards `/auth /query /storage /realtime /rest
/functions /media /search /api` to the Grobase Kong gateway. The browser never
contacts Kong directly, so the strict CSP (`connect-src 'self'`) holds and no
CORS is needed.

## Runtime config

The client reads `window.__BAAS__` from `/baas-config.js` (machine-generated by
`scripts/seed/hypertube-tenant.sh`). At runtime `url` is `''` (same-origin); in
`vite dev` the file 404s harmlessly and the client falls back to `VITE_BAAS_*`
env. Shape: `{ url, anonKey, apiKey, tenantId, mongoDbId, dynamoDbId,
realtimeToken }`.

## Commands (Docker-first)

```sh
# build (typecheck + bundle)
docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -w /app node:20-bookworm-slim \
  sh -c 'npm install && npm run build'

# dev server (proxies to VITE_BAAS_URL, default http://127.0.0.1:8002)
npm run dev

# e2e (needs the stack + seeded tenant up)
PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5174 npm run test:e2e
```

## Layout

| Path | What |
|---|---|
| `src/baas/` | Grobase client: `config`, `session`, `http`, `auth`, `query`, `realtime`, `services` (search/media), `watch` (DynamoDB), `content` (Mongo comments/profiles), `types` |
| `src/i18n/` | tiny custom dictionary (en/fr/es) + provider; English default |
| `src/auth/` | session context + `RequireAuth` route guard |
| `src/library/` | search hook, infinite-scroll hook, `MovieCard` |
| `src/movie/` | stream hook, `VideoPlayer` (`<video>`+`<track>`), live `Comments`, `MovieMeta` |
| `src/pages/` | `Login` `Register` `Library` `Movie` `Profile` |
| `tests/e2e/` | Playwright spec; fails on any console error/warning (42 rule) |

## Routes

- `/login`, `/register` — auth (email/username+password, 42 + Google OAuth, reset request)
- `/library` (auth) — search + sort/filter + infinite-scroll grid, watched badges, popular default
- `/movie/:id` (auth) — player + subtitles + metadata/cast + live comments; first play marks watched
- `/profile/:userId` (auth) — view any user (no email), edit own email/avatar
